categories.label: Adverbs
categories.description: Unnecessary adverbs weaken or clutter the message.

categories.label: Passive voice
categories.description: Passive construction hides who did what.

categories.label: Wordy
categories.description: The message uses more words than the reader needs.

categories.label: Hedging
categories.description: Qualifiers bury or soften the actual point.

categories.label: Hard to read
categories.description: The message needs simpler sentences or structure.

categories.label: Tone
categories.description: The message may read as harsh, defensive, or negative.

categories.label: Grammar
categories.description: The message has grammar, typo, or proofreading issues.

categories.label: Clarity
categories.description: The message is vague, ambiguous, or missing context.

categories.label: Inclusive language
categories.description: The message uses language that could exclude or distract.

categories.label: Professionalism
categories.description: The message could make the sender look unprepared.

categories.label: Structure
categories.description: The message needs clearer ordering or scannability.

categories.label: Audience
categories.description: The tone or detail level does not fit the recipient.
